# PawWork

> PawWork is a free, open-source desktop AI agent for macOS and Windows that helps people complete real work with local files, documents, spreadsheets, research, writing, code, and tools — no terminal, no API key required.

Last updated: 2026-06-05

## Key Links

- Website: https://pawwork.ai/
- Source code: https://github.com/Astro-Han/pawwork
- Download: https://github.com/Astro-Han/pawwork/releases/latest
- English README: https://github.com/Astro-Han/pawwork#readme
- Chinese README: https://github.com/Astro-Han/pawwork/blob/dev/README_CN.md
- License: Apache-2.0 — https://github.com/Astro-Han/pawwork/blob/dev/LICENSE

## About

PawWork brings AI agent work into a native desktop workflow. Users choose a workspace folder, describe a task in plain language, and review the steps, outputs, and generated files before using the result.

PawWork is built for everyday desktop work, not only browser chat or IDE coding. It supports documents, spreadsheets, PDFs, research, writing, code review, debugging, and local file tasks.

PawWork includes a free tier powered by OpenCode Zen with built-in web search. Users can also connect their own accounts through API keys, OAuth (including ChatGPT Plus/Pro), OpenAI-compatible providers, and local models. Over 75 model providers are supported, including OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Kimi, and GLM.

## What PawWork Can Do

- Extract invoice fields from PDFs into a reviewable spreadsheet draft.
- Summarize CSV data files and create short reports.
- Merge, split, and organize PDF and document files.
- Search the web and collect sources for research tasks.
- Turn notes and attachments into written drafts.
- Inspect code projects, review pull requests, and debug issues with logs and source files.
- Handle Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files through bundled OfficeCLI.

## Platforms

- macOS: Apple Silicon and Intel, signed and notarized.
- Windows: x64, signed installer.

## Positioning

PawWork is an open-source alternative to Codex App and Claude Cowork. It offers desktop-native local workspace control, bring-your-own-key model choice across 75+ providers, ChatGPT OAuth support, and reviewable agent outputs — all without requiring a terminal or paid subscription.

## Built On

PawWork is built on a fork of OpenCode (open-source AI coding agent) and bundles OfficeCLI for local Word, Excel, and PowerPoint file handling.
